---
title: "Philosophical Transactions Explorer"
---

This site explores topic distributions in the *Philosophical Transactions of
the Royal Society* across 1665–1886 — 8,545 articles, 25 topics.

The current prototype focuses on **[topic distributions over
time](topics.qmd)**, with the **Experiment** topic as the worked example.

::: {.callout-note}
## What's published

Pre-computed aggregates (counts by year, by topic) and bibliographic metadata
for individual articles (title, DOI, year, link to the publisher). The raw
SQLite metadata file and the scraper's internal URLs are not published.
:::

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
Planned next: author productivity, page-length analysis, and a cross-filter dashboard.
:::
